name: Men's Plastic Round Tortoise Shell Sunglasses - Goodfellow & Co™ Assorted Browns: UV Protection, Impact-Resistant
description: Bring a stylish update to your sunglasses collection with the Plastic Round Tortoise Shell Sunglasses from Goodfellow & Co™. These brown sunglasses have a tortoiseshell-print frame in a round shape for a cool look. Their UV protection feature lenses help keep your eyes shielded from sun rays. Made with a plastic frame for a lightweight feel, these impact-resistant sunglasses fit narrow faces.
